character.definition: great; big; tall; vast, noble; high in rank, very; much
(corrupted form) to make a profit on sell and buy; the profit in business, (interchangeable 嬴) an overplus; gain; profit; abundance
(Cant.) 火㶽, to instant-boil thin slices of meat and vegetables in a chafing dish at the dining table
a small gadfly that suck blood of horse or cow; weevil found in rice, etc.
(same as 魅) mischievous spirit; goblin; elf, a demon with a man's face and four legs, and exhalation of the mountains and forests, to charm; to mislead
surname of the mother of Mencius
a river and county in Jiāngxī; ancient name for 女宿, one of the 28 lunar mansions; used in various star names in Aquarius
grease pot hung under axle of cart
to see; to look at, to examine, to spy upon, to wait upon
